description_long: This is a medium-sized loaf of bread, resembling a traditional baguette or pretzel bread, with a deep golden-brown crust and several diagonal slashes across the top. The crust appears glossy and slightly rough, with a dusting of flour and a few coarse salt crystals visible on the surface. The slashes reveal a lighter, airy interior, suggesting a soft crumb beneath the firm exterior. The loaf is cylindrical and tapers slightly at both ends, with a gentle curve along its length. The bread's surface shows a mix of matte and glossy areas, likely from the baking process and possible egg wash. There are no visible labels, packaging, or branding on the bread.
description: A golden-brown, diagonally-slashed loaf of bread with a glossy, flour-dusted crust and a soft, airy interior peeking through the cuts.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the loaf, highlighting the diagonal slashes and the contrast between the dark crust and pale interior.
description_view_1: End-on view showing the rounded tip and the spiral pattern of the slashes, with the crust's texture and flour dusting visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the loaf's gentle curve, glossy crust, and the continuation of the diagonal slashes.
description_view_3: End-on view from the opposite tip, emphasizing the rounded end and the alignment of the slashes along the loaf.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust features several deep, diagonal slashes that expose the lighter interior, with a dusting of flour and a few coarse salt crystals scattered across the surface. The crust is glossy in places, with a rough, rustic texture typical of artisan or pretzel-style breads.
